preConditions.onFailMessage: Cannot migrate answer_option: preflight found invalid option data, ordering, or cross-question references.

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answer_option ao LEFT JOIN quiz_question q ON q.id = ao.question_id WHERE ao.question_id IS NULL OR q.id IS NULL OR q.discriminator != 'MC' OR ao.answer_options_order IS NULL OR ao.answer_options_order < 0 OR ao.text IS NULL OR TRIM(ao.text) = '' OR ao.is_correct IS NULL OR ao.invalid IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT question_id FROM answer_option GROUP BY question_id HAVING MIN(answer_options_order) != 0 OR MAX(answer_options_order) != COUNT(*) - 1 OR COUNT(DISTINCT answer_options_order) != COUNT(*) ) invalid_orders

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM multiple_choice_submitted_answer_selected_options selected LEFT JOIN submitted_answer submitted ON submitted.id = selected.multiple_choice_submitted_answers_id LEFT JOIN answer_option option_row ON option_row.id = selected.selected_options_id WHERE submitted.id IS NULL OR submitted.discriminator != 'MC' OR option_row.id IS NULL OR submitted.quiz_question_id != option_row.question_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_statistic_counter counter_row LEFT JOIN quiz_question question ON question.quiz_question_statistic_id = counter_row.multiple_choice_question_statistic_id LEFT JOIN answer_option option_row ON option_row.id = counter_row.answer_id WHERE ( counter_row.discriminator = 'AC' AND ( counter_row.answer_id IS NULL OR question.id IS NULL OR question.discriminator != 'MC' OR option_row.id IS NULL OR option_row.question_id != question.id ) ) OR (counter_row.discriminator != 'AC' AND counter_row.answer_id IS NOT NULL)

changeSet.author: artemis
changeSet.sql: UPDATE quiz_question question SET answer_options = COALESCE( ( SELECT jsonb_agg( jsonb_build_object( 'id', option_row.id, 'text', option_row.text, 'hint', option_row.hint, 'explanation', option_row.explanation, 'isCorrect', option_row.is_correct, 'invalid', option_row.invalid ) ORDER BY option_row.answer_options_order ) FROM answer_option option_row WHERE option_row.question_id = question.id ), '[]'::jsonb ), next_component_id = COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(option_row.id) + 1 FROM answer_option option_row WHERE option_row.question_id = question.id), 1 ) WHERE question.discriminator = 'MC'

preConditions.onFailMessage: PostgreSQL answer option JSON backfill did not preserve content, order, IDs, next component IDs, or references.

and.sqlCheck: SELECT ABS( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answer_option) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(jsonb_array_length(answer_options)), 0) FROM quiz_question WHERE discriminator = 'MC') )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_question question WHERE question.discriminator = 'MC' AND question.next_component_id IS DISTINCT FROM COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(option_row.id) + 1 FROM answer_option option_row WHERE option_row.question_id = question.id ), 1 )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answer_option option_row JOIN quiz_question question ON question.id = option_row.question_id WHERE ((question.answer_options -> option_row.answer_options_order ->> 'id')::bigint IS DISTINCT FROM option_row.id) OR NOT question.answer_options @> jsonb_build_array( jsonb_build_object( 'id', option_row.id, 'text', option_row.text, 'hint', option_row.hint, 'explanation', option_row.explanation, 'isCorrect', option_row.is_correct, 'invalid', option_row.invalid ) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM multiple_choice_submitted_answer_selected_options selected JOIN submitted_answer submitted ON submitted.id = selected.multiple_choice_submitted_answers_id JOIN quiz_question question ON question.id = submitted.quiz_question_id WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements(question.answer_options) option_json WHERE (option_json ->> 'id')::bigint = selected.selected_options_id )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_statistic_counter counter_row JOIN quiz_question question ON question.quiz_question_statistic_id = counter_row.multiple_choice_question_statistic_id WHERE counter_row.answer_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements(question.answer_options) option_json WHERE (option_json ->> 'id')::bigint = counter_row.answer_id )

changeSet.author: artemis
changeSet.sql: SET SESSION group_concat_max_len = 1073741824; UPDATE quiz_question question LEFT JOIN ( SELECT option_row.question_id, CONCAT( '[', GROUP_CONCAT( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', option_row.id, 'text', option_row.text, 'hint', option_row.hint, 'explanation', option_row.explanation, 'isCorrect', JSON_EXTRACT(IF(option_row.is_correct, 'true', 'false'), '$'), 'invalid', JSON_EXTRACT(IF(option_row.invalid, 'true', 'false'), '$') ) ORDER BY option_row.answer_options_order SEPARATOR ',' ), ']' ) AS aggregated_options, MAX(option_row.id) + 1 AS next_id FROM answer_option option_row GROUP BY option_row.question_id ) migrated ON migrated.question_id = question.id SET question.answer_options = COALESCE(migrated.aggregated_options, JSON_ARRAY()), question.next_component_id = COALESCE(migrated.next_id, 1) WHERE question.discriminator = 'MC';

preConditions.onFailMessage: MySQL answer option JSON backfill did not preserve content, order, IDs, next component IDs, or references.

and.sqlCheck: SELECT ABS( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answer_option) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(JSON_LENGTH(answer_options)), 0) FROM quiz_question WHERE discriminator = 'MC') )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_question question WHERE question.discriminator = 'MC' AND NOT (question.next_component_id <=> COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(option_row.id) + 1 FROM answer_option option_row WHERE option_row.question_id = question.id ), 1 ))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answer_option option_row JOIN quiz_question question ON question.id = option_row.question_id WHERE CAST( JSON_UNQUOTE( JSON_EXTRACT(question.answer_options, CONCAT('$[', option_row.answer_options_order, '].id')) ) AS UNSIGNED ) != option_row.id OR NOT JSON_CONTAINS( question.answer_options, JSON_OBJECT( 'id', option_row.id, 'text', option_row.text, 'hint', option_row.hint, 'explanation', option_row.explanation, 'isCorrect', JSON_EXTRACT(IF(option_row.is_correct, 'true', 'false'), '$'), 'invalid', JSON_EXTRACT(IF(option_row.invalid, 'true', 'false'), '$') ) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM multiple_choice_submitted_answer_selected_options selected JOIN submitted_answer submitted ON submitted.id = selected.multiple_choice_submitted_answers_id JOIN quiz_question question ON question.id = submitted.quiz_question_id WHERE NOT JSON_CONTAINS(question.answer_options, JSON_OBJECT('id', selected.selected_options_id))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_statistic_counter counter_row JOIN quiz_question question ON question.quiz_question_statistic_id = counter_row.multiple_choice_question_statistic_id WHERE counter_row.answer_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(question.answer_options, JSON_OBJECT('id', counter_row.answer_id))

changeSet.author: artemis
changeSet.sql: UPDATE quiz_question SET answer_options = JSON '[]', next_component_id = 1 WHERE discriminator = 'MC'
